---
title: "NotebookLM — Data Profile (consolidado, multi-conta)"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser v3 (account-1 + account-2 + account-3 legacy)"
source-title: "NotebookLM (consolidado)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "notebooklm"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "NotebookLM"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#F4B400"  # Google yellow/orange
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "NotebookLM"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = ["sources", "notes", "outputs", "guide_questions", "source_guides"]
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None  # consolidated

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **Sobre NotebookLM (consolidado):** agrega 3 contas:
>
> - **account-1** (en) — `hello.marlonlemes`
> - **account-2** (pt-BR) — `marloonlemes`
> - **account-3** (legacy) — `more.design`, conta extinta capturada em mar/2026
>   pelo extractor antigo. Snapshot raw em
>   `data/external/notebooklm-snapshots/more-design-2026-03-30/`,
>   parquets `notebooklm_manual_*.parquet` via parser legacy
>   (`capture_method = 'legacy_notebooklm_more_design'`).
>
> NotebookLM nao eh chat puro — cada notebook gera ate 9 tipos de outputs
> (audio, blog, video, flashcards, quiz, data table, slide deck, infographic,
> mind map). Schema canonico (Conversation/Message/ToolEvent/Branch) eh
> complementado por 5 tabelas auxiliares (sources, notes, outputs,
> guide_questions, source_guides).
>
> `guide.summary` vira system message (sequence=0) em todo notebook —
> garante `message_count >= 1` mesmo quando chat=None.
>
> Para vista de uma conta so: [`notebooklm-acc-1.qmd`](notebooklm-acc-1.html) /
> [`notebooklm-acc-2.qmd`](notebooklm-acc-2.html) /
> [`notebooklm-legacy.qmd`](notebooklm-legacy.html).

{{< include _template.qmd >}}

{{< include _template_aux.qmd >}}
